_meta.purpose: v3.3.0 test-run-monitor canonical case for CIAdapter — a GitHub Actions e2e-suite job with 2 failing steps. Exercises the watcher's CI API polling shape and the synthesizer's classification.

steps.name: Playwright e2e
steps.log_excerpt: FAIL tests/login.spec.ts:24 — expected text 'Welcome' but got 'Sign In'. The login flow is broken since the auth refactor in d04ee1e.

steps.name: Lighthouse audit
steps.log_excerpt: FAIL: performance score 42 below threshold 90. Largest contentful paint 8.4s (was 2.1s on main). Suspect intentional regression — see PR #143.
